calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Personal Property
Off Calendar Jul-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trang La for Claude Faugenet (Petitioner).

The Court stated that this is a petition to have certain accounts be deemed property of the trust estate and to direct the French Bank to take action, and that it is clear that the two bank accounts are trust assets, but it is not prepared to tell the French Bank what they need to do as they are not before the Court. The Court granted the Petition for Order Determining Title to Personal Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Ms. La is to provide a revised order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
